title: dicksonia mollis
intro: Dicksonia mollis, also known as the Australian tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, due to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Dicksonia mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, stems, and roots of the plant.
